title: Kuyashii Gonzo: Blood Visions and Chaos Magic
original_title: Kuyashii Gonzo: Blood Visions and Chaos Magic
overview: Kuyashii Gonzo: Blood Visions and Chaos Magic is a Gonzo documentary about trying to make a no-budget feature film against the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic, unemployment, and death. To never give up, no matter how hard things get.
